plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Opinionated, deterministic SDLC: Linear ticket -> repo plan -> MADR ADRs -> role-isolated TDD (test-author != implementer != judge) -> diff-oriented review -> draft PR. Determinism via the Workflow tool, not skill-triggering.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Linear tracker capability: read ticket, set status, branch naming, link PR, work-log comments. Consumed by dev-workflow as a native dependency.
